sql.query: SELECT s.id,s.locationId,s.spaceName,s.spaceType,s.defaultCapacity,s.isActive,CONCAT(s.spaceName,CASE WHEN s.defaultCapacity IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(' (',s.defaultCapacity,')') ELSE '' END,CASE WHEN s.isActive=0 THEN ' (inactive)' ELSE '' END) AS spaceLabel FROM tbl_spaces s INNER JOIN tbl_locations l ON l.id=s.locationId AND l.tenantId=s.tenantId WHERE s.tenantId=:tenantId AND s.locationId=COALESCE(NULLIF(:locationId,0),(SELECT w.locationId FROM tbl_workflows w WHERE w.id=:workflowId AND w.tenantId=:tenantId2 LIMIT 1)) AND (s.isActive=1 OR s.id=:selectedId) ORDER BY s.isActive DESC,s.sortOrder,s.spaceName
